dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, thank the stars I found you! There's no time to explain properly, but someone's life hangs in the balance.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} was taken by {enemy_type} while traveling the road {location_hint}. A merchant saw them being dragged toward the old ruins and rode hard to bring us word. The guards here are stretched thin defending {location} and can't spare anyone for a rescue. Every hour we waste is an hour closer to losing them forever.
dialogueChunks.outro: I know it's a terrible thing to ask of a stranger, but you're the only one who can reach them in time.

playerResponses.text: Show me where they were taken. I'll bring them back.
Rescues are dangerous work. What's in it for me?
I'm sorry, but I can't take that kind of risk.

dialogueChunks.intro: Please, {player_name}, stop! I've been running since dawn trying to find help.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A group of travelers from {location} got trapped in the caves {location_hint} after a rockslide sealed the entrance behind them. {target_npc} is among them, and they only had supplies for a day's journey. We need someone to clear the debris and fight through whatever {enemy_type} have moved into the tunnels since the collapse. If we don't reach them soon, they'll starve in the dark.
dialogueChunks.outro: They have children with them, {player_name}. Little ones who don't understand why the walls closed in.

playerResponses.text: Children trapped underground? I'm already moving. Point me the way.
I'll dig them out, but I'll need supplies for the effort.
Cave rescues are a death trap. I can't help.

dialogueChunks.intro: You there! You look capable enough. I need help, and I need it now.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A caravan carrying refugees from {location} was ambushed by {enemy_type} on the road {location_hint}. The survivors scattered into the forest, but {target_npc} stayed behind to hold them off so the others could flee. That was yesterday morning. The guards sent a scout, and she came back saying {target_npc} is still alive: barricaded in an overturned wagon, surrounded on all sides. They won't last another night.
dialogueChunks.outro: One person holding the line so dozens could escape. That kind of courage deserves a rescue, not a grave.

playerResponses.text: They held the line alone? I'll get them out. Count on it.
Sounds like a warzone. I'll go, but I expect proper compensation.
If the guards can't handle it, one more sword won't make the difference.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I won't waste your time with pleasantries. People are going to die if I can't find someone brave enough to act.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Floodwaters from the storm two nights ago swept three families off the lowland road near {location}. They managed to reach high ground on a ridge {location_hint}, but the water brought the {enemy_type} with it: they're drawn to the flooding and now they're circling the ridge. {target_npc} tried to lead a rescue party through, but they were forced back. The families have no food, no shelter, and the water isn't receding.
dialogueChunks.outro: Those people climbed to survive. Now they need someone to carry them the rest of the way.

playerResponses.text: I'll cut through whatever's between them and safety.
Floods and monsters together? This won't be easy. I'll need payment.
That's a job for a whole squad, not one person.
